items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #4' is blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring. Without a successful evaluation, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome of the scenario is supported or if it produces a clear failure report. This lack of evaluative evidence leads to an inconclusive status.
